reviews.comment:
No había combustible a la mañana y cuando hubo, poco personal para la cola de automotores que querían cargar.

(Translated by Google)
There was no fuel in the morning, and when there was, there were few people to handle the queue of vehicles wanting to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNab1lHN3JRRRAB

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) The service was friendly, but because it was near the border with Brazil, they charged about 40% more for fuel than during my entire trip through Argentina (I went as far as Buenos Aires).

(Original)
Atendimento cordial, porém por estar próximo a fronteira com o Brasil, cobraram o combustível cerca de 40% mais caro do que em toda minha viagem pela Argentina (fui até Buenos Aires)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9304894923443142675/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNaN05LOUJ3EAE

La atencion de los playeros muy buena. Pero no repara los baños de caballeros. Desde hace 1 mes. Una verguenza. El combustible caro
